output.summary: Updated the MasonryCards test page to match the new test page style used by recently updated blocks. Replaced old format (section headings between variations) with new format (demo-container wrappers with descriptive titles and detailed descriptions for each variation).

testPageUpdates.changesSummary: Replaced 4 old-style variations with 12 comprehensive new-style variations

oldFormat.description: Old test page used section headings (<!-- wp:heading -->) between block variations without demo-container wrappers
issues: Generic section headings instead of descriptive variation titles
No detailed descriptions of what each variation tests

newFormat.description: New test page uses demo-container wrapper blocks with descriptive titles and detailed descriptions for each variation
features: Descriptive titles explaining what configuration is tested
Detailed descriptions outlining specific behaviors being verified
Comprehensive coverage of attributes, edge cases, and responsive behavior

variationsCreated.title: 3-Column Masonry - Full Content
variationsCreated.description: Default 3-column masonry layout with all features: eyebrow, heading, description, two buttons, masonry pattern. Tests staggered row heights with text and image cards, tall cards spanning 3 rows.

variationsCreated.title: 2-Column Aligned Grid
variationsCreated.description: 2-column layout with masonryStyle disabled. Tests aligned row heights (all cards same height) with mixed content types.

variationsCreated.title: 4-Column Masonry
variationsCreated.description: 4-column layout with masonry pattern enabled. Tests complex staggered pattern across desktop (4 cols), tablet (3 cols), and mobile (2 cols) breakpoints.

variationsCreated.title: 3-Column Aligned Grid - No Buttons
variationsCreated.description: 3-column aligned layout without masonry effect. Tests that all cards align in equal-height rows. No eyebrow or buttons.

variationsCreated.title: Minimal Content
variationsCreated.description: Only required fields populated (no heading, eyebrow, description, or buttons). Tests shouldDisplay behavior.

variationsCreated.title: Long Content Edge Case
variationsCreated.description: Edge case with very long eyebrow (50+ chars), heading (100+ chars), description (250+ chars), and long button labels. Tests overflow handling.

variationsCreated.title: Tall Cards in Masonry
variationsCreated.description: Tests tall card functionality (isTall attribute) in masonry mode. Tall cards span 3 rows with split background.

variationsCreated.title: All Image Cards - 2 Column
variationsCreated.description: Grid composed entirely of image cards in 2-column aligned layout. Tests image rendering without text cards.

variationsCreated.title: All Text Cards - 4 Column Masonry
variationsCreated.description: Grid composed entirely of text cards. Tests title size logic (text-header-1 for ≤10 chars, text-header-3 for >10 chars).

variationsCreated.title: Single Card
variationsCreated.description: Edge case with only one card. Tests that grid layout doesn't break with minimal content.

variationsCreated.title: Custom Focal Points
variationsCreated.description: Image cards with varied focal points. Tests that object-position CSS correctly applies focal point coordinates.

variationsCreated.title: Responsive Breakpoints Test
variationsCreated.description: 3-column masonry testing responsive behavior: mobile (1 col stacked), sm (2 col masonry pattern 2,1,1,2), md/lg (3 col pattern 1,2,1,2,1,2).

identifiedPattern.structure: Each variation wrapped in takt/demo-container with title and description attributes
identifiedPattern.comprehensiveCoverage: Includes default, minimal, edge cases, long content, responsive tests
identifiedPattern.descriptiveLabels: Clear titles and detailed descriptions explaining what is being tested

filesModified.change: Replaced old 4-variation format with new 12-variation demo-container format

buildStatus.note: No code changes - WordPress content update only

syncStatus.note: No TSX/PHP changes required - test page content update only
